items.title: Situational Awareness LP files Q1 2026 13F — $13.68B AUM, $8.5B in NEW puts
items.preview: Leopold Aschenbrenner's fund flips to long/short barbell. SMH ETF put $2B notional, NVDA put $1.57B. Top long still SanDisk at $1.11B.

items.title: Anthropic eyeing Q4 2026 IPO — Wilson Sonsini hired, $19B annualized revenue
items.preview: Internal target Q4 2026, October at earliest. S-1 confidential filing rumored for July window. Metaculus prediction market: 66% odds before July 1.

items.title: TSMC 2nm ramp on track — Arizona Fab 2 first wafers Q4 2026
items.preview: TSM 2026 capex $56B. Arizona fabs derisk geopolitically. CoWoS advanced packaging still the rate-limit on every Nvidia/AMD accelerator shipped.

items.title: Eli Lilly's orforglipron cardiovascular outcomes data — full readout October 2026
items.preview: If positive, GLP-1 label extends from endocrinologists to general practitioners. Primary care prescription channel = TAM expansion materially.

items.title: Constellation closes second hyperscaler PPA — 20-year offtake from Three Mile Island Unit 1
items.preview: CEG following Microsoft TMI deal with second confirmed nameplate. Pricing premium 60% over wholesale grid power. Nuclear renaissance moving from narrative to revenue.

items.title: Tenaga Nasional secures RM10B Johor grid expansion capex for FY26
items.preview: Regulated asset base expansion driven by 5+ GW Johor data-center pipeline through 2030. RP4 tariff filing locked in. Premium MY utility play.

_meta.automation: Codex script (scripts/refresh-news.py) pulls 8-10 candidates from finance domains every Sunday, ranks by thesis-relevance, writes top 6 here, commits to git.
